case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ATAULFO PEREZ BRIZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED JUL-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRIZ, ATAULFO PEREZ
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRIZ, ATAULFO PEREZ $1,017.51 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,102.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,017.51 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRIZ, ATAULFO PEREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
